modules.appleSkin.name: AppleSkin
modules.appleSkin.settings.maxHudOverlay: Alpha value of the flashing icons at their most visible point (1.0 = fully opaque, 0.0 = fully transparent)
modules.appleSkin.settings.showFoodExhau: Shows your food exhaustion as a progress bar behind the hunger bar
modules.appleSkin.settings.showFoodHealt: Shows estimated health restored by food on the health bar
modules.appleSkin.settings.showFoodValue: Shows the hunger (and saturation if showSaturationHudOverlay is true) that would be restored by food you are currently holding
Show Food Values HUD Overlay When Offhand
Enables the hunger/saturation/health overlays for food in your off-hand
Shows the hunger and saturation values of food in its tooltip while holding SHIFT
Show Food Values in Tooltip Always
Shows the hunger and saturation values of food in its tooltip automatically (without needing to hold SHIFT)
modules.appleSkin.settings.showSaturatio: Shows your current saturation level overlayed on the hunger bar
modules.appleSkin.settings.showVanillaAn: Health/hunger overlay will shake to match Minecraft's icon animations
modules.autoClicker.name: Auto Clicker
modules.autoClicker.description: Automatically clicks at a set attack speed when enabled
modules.autoClicker.settings.toggleKeybi: Key to toggle auto clicker on/off
modules.autoFish.name: Auto Fish
modules.autoFish.description: Automatically casts and reels in fishing rods when fish are biting
modules.autoFish.settings.reelDelay.name: Reel Delay
modules.autoFish.settings.reelDelay.desc: Delay in ticks between reeling in and casting again
modules.autoFish.settings.stopOnInventor: Automatically disable auto fishing when opening your inventory
Key to toggle auto fishing on/off
modules.autoTool.name: Auto Tool
modules.autoTool.description: Automatically switches to the best tool when mining blocks or attacking entities
modules.autoTool.settings.axes.name: Axes
modules.autoTool.settings.axes.descripti: Allow switching to axes for mining or attacking
modules.autoTool.settings.changeForEntit: Switch to best weapon when attacking entities
modules.autoTool.settings.hoes.name: Hoes
modules.autoTool.settings.hoes.descripti: Allow switching to hoes for mining
modules.autoTool.settings.pickaxes.name: Pickaxes
modules.autoTool.settings.pickaxes.descr: Allow switching to pickaxes for mining
modules.autoTool.settings.shovels.name: Shovels
modules.autoTool.settings.shovels.descri: Allow switching to shovels for mining
modules.autoTool.settings.swords.name: Swords
modules.autoTool.settings.swords.descrip: Allow switching to swords when attacking
modules.fastBreak.name: Fast Break
modules.fastBreak.description: Removes the delay between block breaking in creative mode for faster mining
modules.fastPlace.name: Fast Place
modules.fastPlace.description: Reduces the delay between block placements for faster building
modules.shuffle.name: Shuffle
modules.shuffle.description: After placing a block, switches to a random different hotbar block slot
modules.handItemModel.name: Hand Item Model
modules.handItemModel.description: Customize hand and item positioning, rotation, and scale in first-person view
modules.handItemModel.settings.mainPosit: Main hand position on X axis (-45 to 45)
Main hand position on Y axis (-45 to 45)
Main hand position on Z axis (-30 to 30)
modules.handItemModel.settings.mainRotat: Main hand rotation on X axis (-70 to 70 degrees)
Main hand rotation on Y axis (-60 to 60 degrees)
Main hand rotation on Z axis (-60 to 60 degrees)
modules.handItemModel.settings.offPositi: Off hand position on X axis (-45 to 45)
Off hand position on Y axis (-45 to 45)
Off hand position on Z axis (-30 to 30)
modules.handItemModel.settings.offRotati: Off hand rotation on X axis (-70 to 70 degrees)
Off hand rotation on Y axis (-60 to 60 degrees)
Off hand rotation on Z axis (-60 to 60 degrees)
modules.horseStats.name: Horse Stats
modules.horseStats.description: Displays horse statistics when mounting a horse in the action bar
modules.horseStats.settings.displayDurat: How many seconds to display horse stats in the action bar
modules.lightLevel.name: Light Level
modules.lightLevel.description: Displays light levels on blocks with colored overlays to help prevent mob spawns
modules.lightLevel.settings.chunkScanRan: Distance in blocks around player to show light levels
modules.lightLevel.settings.safeColor.de: Overlay color for light levels are 1 - 15 - no hostile mobs spawn
modules.lightLevel.settings.showSafeArea: When disabled, only shows light level 0 (most dangerous). When enabled, shows all light levels.
modules.lightLevel.settings.threshold.de: Light levels below this value are shown as unsafe (red). Default: 1 (only level 0 is unsafe, matching Minecraft behavior)
Overlay color for light levels are 0 - hostile mobs spawn
modules.noHurtcam.name: No Hurtcam
modules.noHurtcam.description: Disables the screen shake effect when taking damage
modules.scribble.name: BookEdit (Scribble)
modules.scribble.description: Enhanced book editing interface with formatting and undo/redo functionality
Center the book interface on your screen
modules.scribble.settings.copyFormatting: Include formatting codes when copying text (Hold Shift while copying to disable)
modules.scribble.settings.doublePageView: Display two book pages side by side instead of one
modules.scribble.settings.editHistorySiz: Number of undo/redo steps to keep in history (8-128)
modules.scribble.settings.openVanillaBoo: Open Vanilla Book Screen on Shift
Hold Shift when opening a book to use the vanilla book screen instead
modules.scribble.settings.showFormatting: Display buttons for text color and style formatting
text.scribble.action.insert_new_page:
Insert new page
before this one
text.scribble.overwrite_warning.descript: The current contents of this book will be lost!
text.scribble.overwrite_warning.title: Are you sure you want to overwrite this book?
text.scribble.quit_without_saving.descri: The changes made to this book will be lost!
text.scribble.quit_without_saving.title: Are you sure you want to quit without saving?
modules.shieldStatus.name: Shield Status
modules.shieldStatus.description: Displays shield status with color indicators for enabled, in use, and disabled states
modules.shieldStatus.settings.disabledCo: Color of the shield when disabled
modules.shieldStatus.settings.enabledCol: Color of the shield when enabled
modules.shieldStatus.settings.grayscaleT: Removes texture colors before applying the overlay, making the shield color more visible and vibrant
modules.shieldStatus.settings.interpolat: Smoothly fade the shield color from green (enabled) to red (disabled) during cooldown. When off, the color instantly switches to red when broken
modules.shieldStatus.settings.opacity.de: Opacity of the shield (0% = invisible, 100% = fully opaque)
modules.shieldStatus.settings.selfStateO: Shows shield states for the client player only, ignores other players
modules.shieldStatus.settings.usingColor: Color of the shield when in use
modules.stopwatch.name: Stopwatch
modules.stopwatch.description: A simple stopwatch that shows in your actionbar or your HUD.   Hud Element Required to show in the HUD.
modules.tabList.name: Tab List
modules.tabList.description: Displays player ping next to their names in the player list
modules.tabList.settings.showPing.name: Show Ping
modules.tabList.settings.showPing.descri: Display ping values next to player names in the tab list with color coding
modules.timer.name: Timer
modules.timer.description: A simple countdown that shows in your HUD.    Hud Element Required to show in the HUD.
modules.timer.settings.hours.name: Hours
modules.timer.settings.minutes.name: Minutes
modules.timer.settings.resetTimer.name: Reset Timer Key
modules.timer.settings.seconds.name: Seconds
modules.totemcounter.name: Totem Counter
modules.totemcounter.description: Displays your totem count on screen and tracks enemy totem pops in tab list
modules.totemcounter.settings.counterCol: Color code pops - green for 1-2, yellow for 5-6, red for 9+
modules.totemcounter.settings.counterEna: Show how many times enemies popped totems in tab list
modules.totemcounter.settings.displayCol: Color code your totem count - green for high (9+), red for low (1-2)
modules.totemcounter.settings.displayEna: Display your totem count with icon on the HUD
Display a '|' between player name and pop count
modules.trajectoryPreview.name: View Trajectory
modules.trajectoryPreview.description: Displays projectile trajectories and target information when holding throwable items
modules.trajectoryPreview.settings.enabl: Show trajectory preview for items in your off-hand
modules.trajectoryPreview.settings.outli: Draw an outline around the impact target
modules.trajectoryPreview.settings.traje: Visual style of the trajectory line
modules.waypointsV2.name: Waypoints V2
modules.waypointsV2.description: Create, edit, and manage location/block waypoints with configurable rendering and backups
modules.waypointsV2.settings.addBlockKey: Keybind used in block add mode to add the looked-at block
modules.waypointsV2.settings.addWaypoint: Keybind to open the Create Waypoint screen
modules.waypointsV2.settings.groupCombin: How close you must be to nearby grouped waypoints before they combine into one marker
modules.waypointsV2.settings.groupingRad: Radius used to group nearby waypoints
modules.waypointsV2.settings.maxRenderDi: Maximum distance at which waypoints can render
modules.waypointsV2.settings.openWaypoin: Keybind to open the Waypoints list screen
modules.waypointsV2.settings.renderOnlyW: Hide waypoints when the HUD is hidden
modules.waypointsV2.settings.showInSpect: Keep waypoint rendering enabled while in spectator mode
modules.waypointsV2.settings.showThrough: Render waypoints even when blocked by terrain
glowberry.gui.macro.add_command_hint: Start with / for commands, or use . / # for others
hud.elements.pickup_log.name: Pickup Log
hud.elements.pickup_log.description: Logs items picked up and dropped from your inventory with a configurable display
hud.elements.pickup_log.settings.alignme: Horizontal alignment of text within the element
hud.elements.pickup_log.settings.allowIt: Render item names with their formatting colors and styles
Use the item's custom model when rendering its icon
hud.elements.pickup_log.settings.alwaysS: Keep the element visible even when no items have been picked up recently
hud.elements.pickup_log.settings.scale.d: Size of the element as a percentage (100 = default size)
hud.elements.pickup_log.settings.shorten: Display counts of 1000 or more in shorthand (e.g. 1.2k instead of 1200)
hud.elements.timer_stopwatch.name: Timer & Stopwatch
hud.elements.timer_stopwatch.description: Displays the Timer and Stopwatch modules together in a single HUD element
hud.elements.timer_stopwatch.settings.al: Horizontal alignment of text within the element
Keep the element visible even when neither the Timer nor Stopwatch module is active
hud.elements.timer_stopwatch.settings.sc: Size of the element as a percentage (100 = default size)
